# LEXSAS

> LEXSAS (lexsas.com) is an AI legal-tech venture founded in 2026 by Asim Serdar Yilmaz
> (Asim Serdar Yilmaz / Asım Serdar Yılmaz), focused on legal workflow automation and
> advisory for legal and regulatory teams, with privacy, IP and governance guardrails
> built in. Bilingual site: English at the root, Turkish under /tr/.

## Who is behind it

Asım Serdar Yılmaz is a senior legal and regulatory affairs leader based in Istanbul,
Turkey: currently a Regulatory Affairs Director at a global group in a highly regulated
industry (leading the regulatory agenda within corporate affairs) and founder of LEXSAS.
His 20+ years span
Amazon (Legal Director, Technology, E-Commerce and Media, 2019-2026; statutory
board director), eBay (Head of Legal and Business Ethics Officer, MENA), a global
group in a highly regulated industry (Regional Legal Counsel and Company Secretary,
Middle East) and White & Case (Associate, Ankara). Ankara Bar. Languages: Turkish,
English.

## Expertise

- Legal tech and AI workflow automation for legal teams
- AI governance and responsible generative AI adoption (built GenAI legal tooling on AWS Bedrock)
- Regulatory affairs and corporate affairs in regulated digital markets
- E-commerce law, marketplace and platform regulation, intermediary liability
- Data protection and data sovereignty (KVKK, GDPR, cross-border data transfers)
- Competition law and digital markets (parity, ranking, algorithmic accountability)
- Payments and fintech regulation; consumer protection and advertising law
- Corporate governance, statutory board directorship, legal operations

## Contact

- Email: serdar@lexsas.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/asimserdaryilmaz/

Note: LEXSAS provides informational consultancy, not legal representation, and this
site does not create an attorney-client relationship.
